faqs.question: Do you accept same-day appointments?
faqs.answer: Same-day appointments are available when the schedule allows, especially for dental pain, chipped teeth, swelling, and urgent concerns. Calling early in the day gives the team the best chance to help.

faqs.question: Is cosmetic dentistry right for every patient?
faqs.answer: Not always. We start with oral health, bite function, and realistic goals. Cosmetic treatments are recommended only when they support a stable, healthy result.

faqs.question: What happens during a new patient visit?
faqs.answer: Your first visit usually includes a conversation about goals and concerns, digital imaging if needed, a comprehensive exam, and a clear discussion of options before treatment begins.

faqs.question: Do clear aligners hurt?
faqs.answer: Most patients feel pressure for a few days after switching trays. We review fit, hygiene, and comfort tips so the process feels manageable.

faqs.question: Can I use this template with real booking software?
faqs.answer: Yes. The appointment form and CTA links are frontend placeholders and can be connected to a booking system, CRM, or secure patient intake workflow.

journeySteps.title: Consultation
journeySteps.description: We listen first, review your goals, and explain options without pressure or rushed treatment plans.

journeySteps.title: Digital scan
journeySteps.description: High-resolution imaging and intraoral scanning help us plan precisely and show you what we see.

journeySteps.title: Personalized treatment plan
journeySteps.description: Your care plan balances comfort, budget, timing, and long-term oral health rather than one-size-fits-all dentistry.

journeySteps.title: Comfortable treatment
journeySteps.description: Gentle techniques, quiet rooms, and clear check-ins help visits feel calm from start to finish.

journeySteps.title: Follow-up care
journeySteps.description: We monitor healing, answer questions, and schedule maintenance so results stay healthy and natural.

services.title: General dentistry
services.description: Comprehensive exams, cleanings, fillings, night guards, and preventive care for lasting oral health.

services.title: Cosmetic dentistry
services.description: Veneers, bonding, contouring, and smile design with natural proportions and conservative planning.

services.title: Teeth whitening
services.description: Professional whitening options selected around sensitivity, timeline, and your natural tooth shade.

services.title: Invisalign / clear aligners
services.description: Discreet alignment planning with digital scans, clear timelines, and progress checks that fit real life.

services.title: Dental implants
services.description: Thoughtful implant coordination, restoration planning, and maintenance support for missing teeth.

services.title: Emergency dental care
services.description: Prompt help for tooth pain, chipped teeth, swelling, lost crowns, and urgent dental concerns.

storyCards.title: Comfort-led rooms
storyCards.description: Soft lighting, private suites, and easy conversation help patients feel grounded before treatment begins.

storyCards.title: Modern diagnostics
storyCards.description: Digital scans and low-radiation imaging create clearer treatment plans and fewer surprises.

storyCards.title: Visible hygiene standards
storyCards.description: Sterilization protocols, organized operatories, and transparent workflows support patient confidence.

storyCards.title: Personalized pacing
storyCards.description: We make room for questions, sensitivity concerns, and phased treatment when that is the better path.

testimonials.quote: The team explained every step and never made me feel rushed. The office feels calm, bright, and genuinely thoughtful.

testimonials.quote: I came in anxious about a cracked tooth. They handled the urgent visit quickly and gave me a clear plan before doing anything.
testimonials.name: Jordan P.

testimonials.quote: My aligner consultation was refreshingly honest. I understood the timeline, tradeoffs, and what would actually improve my bite.
testimonials.name: Sofia L.

testimonials.quote: The hygiene visit was thorough but gentle. This is the first dental office I have returned to without delaying the appointment.
testimonials.name: Nolan B.
